programme.title: True Love Blooms
programme.desc: A woman fights to save her community garden from a handsome real estate developer.

programme.title: Hailey Dean Mysteries: A Marriage Made for Murder
programme.desc: Hailey's code of ethics prevents her from going to the police about a client's confession.

programme.title: Framed for Murder: A Fixer Upper Mystery
programme.desc: Shannon investigates the murder of a friend with help from a famous crime reporter.

programme.title: Morning Show Mystery: Mortal Mishaps
programme.desc: Billie Blessings becomes the prime suspect in a murder case when an executive dies from poisoning.

programme.title: Garage Sale Mysteries: Pilot
programme.desc: Jennifer loves scouring garage sales to look for items to sell in her resell shop, but realizes a series of burglaries and a friend's murder may have a connection to the sales.

programme.title: Hailey Dean Mysteries: A Marriage Made for Murder
programme.desc: Hailey's code of ethics prevents her from going to the police about a client's confession.

programme.title: My Sister's Keeper
programme.desc: Hallmark Hall of Fame. Two sisters embark on a journey of discovery and reconciliation.

programme.title: Loving Leah
programme.desc: Hallmark Hall of Fame. When Leah's husband Benjamin dies suddenly, she is to marry his brother.

programme.title: The Echo of Thunder
programme.desc: Hallmark Hall of Fame. After her mother's death, Lara goes to live with her father in the Australia.

programme.title: Back When We Were Grownups
programme.desc: A widow (Blythe Danner) tries to rekindle an old flame (Peter Fonda).

programme.title: Home by Spring
programme.desc: A young event planner must return to her rural hometown to plan an outdoor retreat.

programme.title: Love by Chance
programme.desc: A woman has no idea that her mother is trying to find a perfect man for her.

programme.title: Mom's Day Away
programme.desc: A happily married woman (Bonnie Somerville) spends Mother's Day weekend away from her family.

programme.title: Walking the Dog
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Rival lawyers battle each other in court as their respective dogs fall in love.

programme.title: When Sparks Fly
programme.desc: A woman learns that the man who she loves is engaged to her best friend.

programme.title: When Sparks Fly
programme.desc: A woman learns that the man who she loves is engaged to her best friend.

programme.title: Signed, Sealed, Delivered
programme.desc: Co-workers embark on a mission to deliver a letter from a dying woman to the man that she loves.

programme.title: Signed, Sealed, Delivered: From Paris With Love
programme.desc: The Postables explore the mysteries of true love when they deliver divorce papers to a couple.
